commands.review_summary:
This branch adds the missing Trust link to the press page footer and adds a standard footer navigation block to the privacy page.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main shows `src/pages/press.astro` has a footer without the Trust link, and `src/pages/privacy.astro` has no footer navigation block. I did not run a build because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: The patch has no concrete code defect for automation to repair, but the contributor should add inspectable real behavior proof before merge; updating the PR body should trigger a fresh ClawSweeper review, or a maintainer can request `@clawsweeper re-review`.

target.title: fix(nav): add missing Trust link to press footer, add footer to privacy page
target.body:
## Summary

Two footer navigation inconsistencies fixed:

1. **Press page**: footer nav had 5 links but was missing the Trust link that every other page includes
2. **Privacy page**: had no footer navigation at all; users reaching `/privacy` from app stores or emails had no way to discover blog, trust, showcase, or other pages without going home first

## Changes

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `src/pages/press.astro` | Add Trust link after Integrations in footer nav |
| `src/pages/privacy.astro` | Add full footer nav matching the standard pattern |

## Verification

- **Behavior addressed**: inconsistent footer navigation across pages
- **Real environment tested**: local Astro build
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `npx astro build && grep trust.openclaw.ai dist/press/index.html dist/privacy/index.html && grep -c footer-nav dist/privacy/index.html`
- **Evidence after fix**: press page now has Trust link, privacy page now has full footer with 7 links
- **Observed result after fix**: all pages have consistent footer navigation
- **What was not tested**: production Vercel deployment, visual rendering across screen sizes
